data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. PAW FAROK has shown good improvement at his last two starts, rewarded with a win last time at Healesville over 350m. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card in scoring last start. Can measure up again. 6. PAW PHARAH is a talented type and proved too classy last time to win by 2.75 lengths at Ballarat in a handy 25.83 beating Paw Jerry. Has definite claims. 1. TACTICIAN was safely held last time out, finishing sixth at Horsham over 485m behind Keen On Kev (28.06) in a Grade 5. Great chance to atone. 2. SHREK'S BROTHER can fill a top-three spot.","runners":[8,6,1,2],"exclusive":false}
